calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-25-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Eugene Payne.

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio stated that she has consents for her dual roll signed by the Administrator and the Beneficiaries. Counsel also addressed extraordinary fees, the commissions payment and the State Bar Formal Opinion's differentiation between dual roles. The accounting petition was continued to September 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Continued To Aug-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanette Fisher-Kouadio for Eugene Payne (Petitioner). Jason Rockmore (Son/Objector).

The Court grants one last continuance for Mr. Rockmore to file proper objections or a competiting petition. The matter was continued to September 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Proper objections or competiting petition shall be filed 3 days before the next hearing date. The Court advised Mr. Rockmore to seek legal help.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
